    H

    HARD - Enum constant in enum class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Intensity
    High-effort workout requiring maximum exertion.
    hardButton - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.InputFormPanel
    Radio button for "hard" intensity.
